Milestone 1.1 \u2014 Repository reconnai.description: The team understands the real repo and freezes the initial execution plan. Parent epic: Epic 1. Foundations and Domain Contracts.

Milestone 1.2 \u2014 Core domain entitie.description: The canonical entity set and invariants are defined in code. Parent epic: Epic 1. Foundations and Domain Contracts.

Milestone 1.3 \u2014 Persistence schema,.description: The data model exists in storage with initial seed data. Parent epic: Epic 1. Foundations and Domain Contracts.

Milestone 2.1 \u2014 Workspace lifecycle.description: Users can create isolated workspaces and begin cold start. Parent epic: Epic 2. Workspace, Inbox, and Source Intake.

Milestone 2.2 \u2014 Source intake and r.description: Raw inputs are ingested, stored, and never overwritten. Parent epic: Epic 2. Workspace, Inbox, and Source Intake.

Milestone 2.3 \u2014 Inbox operations an.description: Imported items appear in Inbox and can be compiled or retried. Parent epic: Epic 2. Workspace, Inbox, and Source Intake.

Milestone 3.1 \u2014 Knowledge node gene.description: The system can create foundational topic/project/method/question nodes. Parent epic: Epic 3. Compilation Core and Evidence Traceability.

Milestone 3.2 \u2014 Evidence fragment e.description: Every high-level object can point back to source evidence. Parent epic: Epic 3. Compilation Core and Evidence Traceability.

Milestone 3.3 \u2014 Human reviewability.description: Users can inspect and correct derived knowledge. Parent epic: Epic 3. Compilation Core and Evidence Traceability.

Milestone 4.1 \u2014 Capability signal g.description: The system emits evidence-backed capability signals. Parent epic: Epic 4. Capability Signals, Mistake Patterns, and Focus Layer.

Milestone 4.2 \u2014 Mistake pattern gen.description: The system can detect and manage recurring mistake patterns. Parent epic: Epic 4. Capability Signals, Mistake Patterns, and Focus Layer.

Milestone 4.3 \u2014 Focus Card lifecycl.description: The system can represent what the user is currently trying to solve. Parent epic: Epic 4. Capability Signals, Mistake Patterns, and Focus Layer.

Milestone 5.1 \u2014 Postcard generation.description: The system can generate versioned topic-level Postcards. Parent epic: Epic 5. Postcards and Passport.

Milestone 5.2 \u2014 Postcard updates an.description: Postcards evolve safely as the knowledge base changes. Parent epic: Epic 5. Postcards and Passport.

Milestone 5.3 \u2014 Passport manifest g.description: The system can generate a compact human-readable and machine-readable Passport. Parent epic: Epic 5. Postcards and Passport.

Milestone 6.1 \u2014 Passport-first moun.description: External AI can begin with Passport, representative Postcards, and active Focus only. Parent epic: Epic 6. Mounting, Visa Bundles, and Session Control.

Milestone 6.2 \u2014 Visa Bundles and to.description: Deeper reads are permissioned through explicit scope packages. Parent epic: Epic 6. Mounting, Visa Bundles, and Session Control.

Milestone 6.3 \u2014 Mount sessions and.description: Every external AI interaction is captured and traceable. Parent epic: Epic 6. Mounting, Visa Bundles, and Session Control.

Milestone 7.1 \u2014 Review Queue ingest.description: External AI outputs become reviewable candidates instead of canonical writes. Parent epic: Epic 7. Review Queue, Audit, Export, and Recovery.

Milestone 7.2 \u2014 Review actions and.description: Users can review, edit, and decide whether a candidate becomes part of the knowledge base. Parent epic: Epic 7. Review Queue, Audit, Export, and Recovery.

Milestone 7.3 \u2014 Audit, export, back.description: Users can inspect history and retain data sovereignty. Parent epic: Epic 7. Review Queue, Audit, Export, and Recovery.

Milestone 8.1 \u2014 Thin operator UI.description: Users can complete the end-to-end flow through a minimal but coherent interface. Parent epic: Epic 8. Thin UI, Quality Gates, and Pilot Readiness.

Milestone 8.2 \u2014 Benchmarks, traceab.description: The team can verify compile quality and trust boundaries repeatedly. Parent epic: Epic 8. Thin UI, Quality Gates, and Pilot Readiness.

Milestone 8.3 \u2014 Release gates and p.description: The product is ready for real-user validation. Parent epic: Epic 8. Thin UI, Quality Gates, and Pilot Readiness.
